name: cloud build: a dry-run previews without writing the build unit
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh" scaffold --decision-id d4 --pillar security --build-dir dr --dry-run --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>&1 | grep -E 'dry_run=true' 1>&2
{ [ ! -e dr ] && echo no-files 1>&2; } || { echo FAIL 1>&2; exit 1; }
